name: Chocolate Chip and Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Line half-cup muffin cups with foil liners.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking powder.
4. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
5. In another bowl, mix milk, oil, eggs, and orange peel.
6. Stir the milk mixture into the dry ingredients (the mixture will be lumpy).
7. Add chocolate chips to the batter.
8. Divide the batter among the muffin cups.
9. Bake the muffins until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes.
10. Transfer the muffins to a rack.
11. Serve warm or at room temperature.
